name: Wardrobe of Venus
description:
(A more open TG experience for male personas)

An ornate wardrobe, famed for the myths surrounding it. Those who wear the garments within are never the same.

How you got there, and how you knew what the wardrobe was, are up to you. Afterall, it's been getting an awful lot of coverage in the media. It is the garments within that remain a mystery. To most, the doors are locked, but they shall open for you.

This is my attempt at something a little more open, where you guys get to control the outcome a little more!

This was made following a fan suggestion. Great big hugs to all of you guys!

<3 As always, please feel free to give feedback, and be honest with me! It's especially important when this is so different to my usual stuff. <3
creator: aspectdoll
